headlines: Cut Sourcing Time in Half with AI
AI Workflows That Find Talent Fast
The Faster Way to Build Talent Pools
primary_texts: Still manually hunting for candidates one by one? Learn how AI workflows can slash your sourcing time dramatically — and help you build quality talent pools without touching LinkedIn. Join us April 2nd. Grab your spot →

Your competitors are already using AI to source faster. In this 90-minute workshop, you'll master the exact workflows top recruiters use to find hidden talent in record time. Limited seats available. Register now →
What if you could source in hours what used to take weeks? This hands-on session shows you how to build AI-powered sourcing systems that work while you sleep. April 2nd, 3PM UTC. Save your seat →
Tired of the LinkedIn hamster wheel? Discover how smart recruiters are using AI tools to speed up sourcing and uncover talent others miss — all in one live workshop. Spots filling fast. Join us →

Manual sourcing is dead. AI workflows are the new competitive edge in talent acquisition. Learn exactly how to set them up in this practical 90-minute session. Pro tier includes the full AI Toolkit. Claim your spot →
